creator: warlock@phouka.net
text:
For what it's worth, these changes are working fine for me.  Not too many dependencies on it:

        xf86-input-keyboard: 1.9.0_5
        xf86-input-libinput: 1.2.0_1
        xf86-input-mouse: 1.9.3_4
        xf86-video-scfb: 0.0.7_1
        xorg: 7.7_3
        xorg-drivers: 7.7_7
        xorg-server: 21.1.4,1

My RPI is using this as a driver for X:

        x11-drivers/xf86-video-scfb
